calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH calls have been highly accurate (91.7% success rate), particularly on indices during high_vol_downtrend regimes. However, I've been too uniform with 75% confidence on all trades - need to differentiate based on signal strength. My intraday predictions show excellent price targeting (avg 0.33% error) but I should lower confidence when news headlines conflict with technical/flow signals.
